sqlMap.select:
select sum(WithdrawAmount) as WithdrawAmount, sum(WithdrawFee) as WithdrawFee from cpstatown
StatDay=#statday#
sqlMap.insert: insert into cpstatown (Id,AppId, StatDay, PayAmount, PayFee, WithdrawAmount, WithdrawFee,TodayWithdrawNum) VALUES (null,#AppId#,#StatDay#,#PayAmount#,#PayFee#,#WithdrawAmount#,#WithdrawFee#,#TodayWithdrawNum#)
sqlMap.update: update cpstatown set WithdrawAmount=#WithdrawAmount#, WithdrawFee=#WithdrawFee#, TodayWithdrawNum=#TodayWithdrawNum# where Id=#id#
